name: ocrmypdf
description: A plugin that runs OCR on PDF files using OCRmyPDF, producing a searchable PDF with an embedded text layer and returning the extracted plain text as JSON output. OCR'd output PDFs are cached in pluginStorage to avoid redundant re-processing.

process.description: Run OCR on a PDF file and return extracted text, page count, cache status, and output PDF path.

filePath.description: The path to the PDF file to be processed.

pluginStorage.description: Directory path for storing cached OCR'd PDFs. Created if it does not exist.

ocrText.description: Full plain-text content extracted from the OCR'd PDF.

pageCount.description: Number of pages in the PDF.

wasCached.description: true if the cached OCR'd PDF was reused, false if OCR was freshly run.

outputPdf.description: Absolute path to the OCR'd PDF stored in pluginStorage.

installed.description: Check if both ocrmypdf and pdftotext are available on the system.
true only if both ocrmypdf and pdftotext are available, false otherwise.

install.description: Install ocrmypdf and pdftotext (poppler-utils) if not already available.

success.description: true if both tools are available after the installation attempt.

message.description: Human-readable status message describing the installation result.
